questions.question: Describe the key components of a two-dimensional Human-Centred AI (HCAI) framework. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the primary elements and their relationships

questions.question: What is the primary design principle guiding the development of trustworthy HCAI systems? (5 marks)
Explain the significance of the taxonomy of harmful AI (TAHA) in the design of HCAI systems. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the categorisation of harmful AI and its implications for system design
